name: getJira
description:
ALWAYS USE THIS TOOL to access Jira. Always execute a fresh Jira operation — never reuse issue data from previous calls. If a previous call failed, retry with corrected parameters. Supports high-level ops (LIST/TASK/STATUS/CREATE/DELETE/UPDATE) and raw API requests. Enforces configured project key and credentials. JQL is normalized automatically. LIST returns {key, summary, status}.
MULTI-WORKER: Multiple agents may operate on DIFFERENT issues in parallel safely. Concurrent UPDATE/STATUS calls on the SAME issue cause conflicts — serialize writes to the same issue.

op.description: High-level operation. If omitted, raw request mode is used via the 'json' field.

jql.description: For LIST: optional JQL filter. Project scoping is auto-enforced unless meta.allowCrossProject=true.

resolutionName.description: Optional resolution to set during STATUS (e.g. 'Done', 'Won't Fix').

forceDelete.description: For DELETE: true to perform hard delete; otherwise a transition to 'Done' is attempted.

fields.description: For CREATE/UPDATE: Jira REST fields payload (summary, issuetype, etc.).

json.description: Raw low-level Jira request (alternative to op-mode). Proxy enforces base URL and project key.
